idea_summary: Adapted prior best iter023 wait2 split-epilogue 64x128 1p1c kernel as starting p
1p2c warp-specialization with TILE_M=128 for better compute density
Added __launch_bounds__(256, 2) to improve register allocation and occupancy
Added --use_fast_math nvcc flag for faster math approximations
Increased pipeline stages from 3 to 4 for better latency hiding
Reduced pipeline stages from 3 to 2 to decrease SMEM usage
Changed WARP_N from 128 to 96 for different register pressure profile
Increased WARP_N from 128 to 192 for larger accumulator
Capped registers at 128 with -maxrregcount to increase occupancy
Lowered register cap to 96 for even higher occupancy
Register cap at 112 optimal between 128 and 96
Added pragma unroll to inner WGMMA loop
Tried launch_bounds(256,1) for single block per SM
